fields.title: OKF Golden Agent
fields.description: Close the books accurately and on time.

body:
# OKF Golden Agent

> A representative spec for byte-parity testing.

## Overview

- **Persona:** Operations Analyst
- **Department:** Finance
- **Objective:** Close the books accurately and on time.

## KPI summary

- **Cycle time**: 5 days → 1 day
- **Manual touches**: 12 → 2

## Contents

- [Playbook — role, scope, guardrails](/playbook.md)
- [Source Systems](/systems/index.md)

- [Eval Scenarios](/tests/index.md)
- [Source Documents](/documents/index.md)

fields.title: OKF Golden Agent — Playbook
fields.description: Operating contract for the OKF Golden Agent agent.

body:
# Playbook

## Role

Reconcile and close ledger periods.

## Primary objective

Close the books accurately and on time.

## In scope

- Pull balances
- Reconcile entries

## Out of scope

- Tax filing

## Escalation rules

| Trigger | Action | Rationale |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Variance > 1% | Notify manager | Material threshold |

## Refusal rules

- Never post without approval

## Hard guardrails

- Never post without approval
- Every published claim must cite its source-system evidence (see evidence requirements).

## See also

- [Agent Tools](/tools/index.md)
- [Workflow Stages](/workflow/index.md)

# Citations

- [Controls Playbook](/documents/controls-playbook.md)

# Source Systems

- [Core Ledger](/systems/core-ledger.md)
- [Notification Service](/systems/notify-svc.md)

# Core Ledger

Primary ledger of record.

- **Protocol:** rest
- **Local backing:** ledger.duckdb

# Schema

- [GLEntry](/tables/glentry.md)

## Tools using this system

- [query_core_ledger_gl](/tools/query-core-ledger-gl.md)

# Notification Service

- **Protocol:** —

# Schema

_No entities._

## Tools using this system

- [notify_manager](/tools/notify-manager.md)
- [notify-manager](/tools/notify-manager-2.md)

# Data Entities

- [GLEntry](/tables/glentry.md)
- [Orphan](/tables/orphan.md)

fields.title: GLEntry
fields.description: Data entity GLEntry owned by Core Ledger.

body:
# GLEntry

# Schema

| Field | Type | Constraints |
| --- | --- | --- |
| entryId | string | required; primary key |
| status | enum | values: open, closed |
| rawNote |  |  |

# Citations

- Owned by [Core Ledger](/systems/core-ledger.md)

# Orphan

# Schema

_No fields defined._

# Agent Tools

- [query_core_ledger_gl](/tools/query-core-ledger-gl.md)
- [notify_manager](/tools/notify-manager.md)
- [notify-manager](/tools/notify-manager-2.md)

# query_core_ledger_gl

Read GL entries.

- **Kind:** query
- **Source system:** [Core Ledger](/systems/core-ledger.md)

## Required inputs

- period

## Produces

- balances

## Evidence emitted

- gl_entry

# Examples

```
query_core_ledger_gl(period=<period>)
```

## Used by

- [balance_pull](/workflow/balance-pull.md)

# notify_manager

underscore variant

- **Kind:** action
- **Source system:** [Notification Service](/systems/notify-svc.md)

## Required inputs

_None specified._

## Produces

_None specified._

## Evidence emitted

_None specified._

# Examples

```
notify_manager()
```

## Used by

- [reconcile](/workflow/reconcile.md)

# notify-manager

hyphen variant

- **Kind:** action
- **Source system:** [Notification Service](/systems/notify-svc.md)

## Required inputs

_None specified._

## Produces

_None specified._

## Evidence emitted

_None specified._

# Examples

```
notify-manager()
```

## Used by

- [reconcile](/workflow/reconcile.md)

# Workflow Stages

- **Mode:** sequential

1. [Balance Pull](/workflow/balance-pull.md)
2. [Reconcile](/workflow/reconcile.md)

# Balance Pull

Pull period balances.

- **Mode:** sequential
- **Stage:** 1 of 2

## Tools

- [query_core_ledger_gl](/tools/query-core-ledger-gl.md)

Next: [Reconcile](/workflow/reconcile.md)

# Reconcile

- **Mode:** sequential
- **Stage:** 2 of 2

## Tools

- [notify_manager](/tools/notify-manager.md)
- [notify-manager](/tools/notify-manager-2.md)

# Source Documents

- [Controls Playbook](/documents/controls-playbook.md)

# Controls Playbook

Internal controls reference.

- **Type:** policy

## Citation anchors

- section-3
- section-4

fields.title: Eval Scenarios
fields.description: How each Query Capability is tested: the mechanisms (tools) a test must exercise.

body:
# Eval Scenarios

- [Close the current period end-to-end.](/tests/e2e-close.md)
- [Plain string eval prompt.](/tests/plain-string-eval-prompt.md)

# Close the current period end-to-end.

## Validates

- [balance-pull](/queries/balance-pull.md)

## Mechanisms to call

- [query_core_ledger_gl](/tools/query-core-ledger-gl.md)

## Success rubric

Pulls balances and cites the controls playbook.

# Citations

- [Controls Playbook](/documents/controls-playbook.md)

# Plain string eval prompt.

## Mechanisms to call

_No mechanisms specified._

## Success rubric

Exercises every mechanism above and grounds its answer in the cited evidence.

# KPIs

| KPI | Before | After |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Cycle time | 5 days | 1 day |
| Manual touches | 12 | 2 |

# Golden Evals

### Eval 1
- **Prompt:** Close the current period end-to-end.
- **Expected:** Pulls balances and cites the controls playbook.

### Eval 2
- **Prompt:** Plain string eval prompt.
